title: Stone Torch
description: Simple stone torches and the stone sticks to make them
body: Adds simple stone sticks, made from two cobble or equivalent (the same options as available for furnaces and brewing stands - cobblestone, cobbled deepslate, and blackstone), and stone torches made from stone sticks and coal or charcoal, which illuminate slightly less than regular torches but bring the benefit of not carrying sticks down on mining trips.
